## Summary

<!-- One sentence describing what you want. -->

## Motivation

<!-- Why is this useful? What problem does it solve? Who benefits? -->

<!-- How do you imagine this working? CLI flag, config key, behavior change? -->

<!-- Any other approaches you thought about and why you ruled them out. -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Screenshots, links, examples from other tools, etc. -->
